sector_alerts.title: Ebola outbreak spreads to 4th DRC province (Haut-Uele) June 30 — borders South Sudan and CAR; 1,307 cases / 377 deaths
sector_alerts.summary: June 30, 2026: DRC Ebola outbreak (Bundibugyo strain, no vaccine/treatment) confirmed in Haut-Uele province after infected person traveled from Bunia (Ituri) — the 4th affected province. DRC entire northeast (15 million people) now affected. Cumulative: 1,307 confirmed cases / 377 deaths (updated from 1,155/304 on June 25). Uganda: 19 confirmed cases; borders closed since May 27 with 21-day isolation requirement. Haut-Uele borders South Sudan and the Central African Republic, elevating cross-border risk to both countries. Fastest-growing Ebola outbreak in recorded history; growing faster than any prior recorded outbreak.

sector_alerts.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire framework under severe stress: 83 killed/141 wounded day of ceasefire; 100+ Israeli airstrikes since midnight
sector_alerts.summary: June 30, 2026: Lebanon Ministry of Public Health reports 83 people killed and 141 wounded in Israeli attacks on Friday, the day of the renewed ceasefire — most casualties in southern Lebanon with 100+ Israeli air strikes since midnight of the ceasefire. Israeli drone struck Nabatieh the day after the US-brokered framework agreement. Hezbollah rejected framework as "humiliation, disgrace, surrender." US Secretary Rubio called the deal "the beginning of the beginning" but Day 2 shows framework is not holding. Framework requires Hezbollah disarmament — which Hezbollah calls "crosses all red lines." 4,000+ killed in Lebanon since Mar 2, 2026; 1.2M+ displaced.

sector_alerts.title: EU AI Act August 2 enforcement deadline: 33 days — Meta declined GPAI Code of Practice; xAI partial; Anthropic behind OpenAI on EU access
sector_alerts.summary: June 30, 2026: EU AI Act Articles 9-17 and Article 26 enforcement begins August 2, 2026 — 33 days away. GPAI Code of Practice signatories include Anthropic, Google, IBM, Microsoft, Mistral AI, OpenAI, Cohere. Meta did NOT sign the Code of Practice. xAI signed only the Safety and Security chapter. European Commission welcomed OpenAI offer to provide open access to cybersecurity model; Anthropic has not reached the same point in EU discussions. Penalties for prohibited practices: up to €35M or 7% of global annual turnover. Digital Omnibus amendment (proposed extension to Dec 2027) has NOT been enacted — August 2 remains operative.

entity_reviews.name: Bolivia
